TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Taywan_Ciwben_Suynantung„ÄĚsabawtuli_a_dang„Äě, title = Taywan_Ciwben_Suynantung„ÄĚsabawtuli_a_dang„Äě, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Taywan_Ciwben_Suynantung„ÄĚsabawtuli_a_dang„Äě} }

S.FORM: == tatangahan == Taywan Ciw-Ben Suy-Nan-Tung nazipa'an nu pi'kiman "sabaw tulu a dang" hananay . kakiliman zikuzan pikuwan nu hulam i nikakutaykutay nu Cing katukuh ayaw pikuwanan nu Lipun uynian a kenis pangangan han Suy-Nan-Tung han a niyazu' , ya "tabakiay nisulitan tu Suy-Nan-Tung" hananay sa nu zikuzan tu pikuwan nu Lipun, pahezek tu sakatusa a kitakitay na mangangayaw hawsa palatusa han tu Lian-Tung li atu Cang-Zen li han. u kakitizaan Suy-Nan-Tung a i Ciw-Ben sauwac tusa a tukus tu sa cumud a bayu, i kalipunan pisangangan tu "sabaw tulu a dang a pi'kiman" hawsa, kakilul satu mabulaw tayni, i liwliw nu ayzaay a Lian-Sin li atu Lian-Tung li . Suy-Nan-Tung a kitizaan a ngangan namakay i pi'kingan a putah tapiingan niya tabakian a ba'tu tu malucay nu bayu a buhang, i tapiingan niya buhang izaw ku sauwac musisil namakayza i buyu' muculal, malu nu ayaway i tapiingan nu buhang masau silanu'ay a lala' "nan-ce-ti" pangangan han tu Suy-Nan-Tung. Suy-Nan-Tung micapi tu bayu, i sawali saamis a kalimucu' mahiniay u masatakuay, paymihcaan namakay wali saamisay a bali pabesut' sa micumud, tabaki ku bali udad. Sapalekal tu lalay Suy-Nan-Tung i kahulaman Suy-Nan-Tung a niyazu' han, i kalipunan u Luy-Bang han a niyazu', pahezek ku mamangayaw nu kitakit sa mala u Luy-Bang a ceng , ya Lian-Tung li u yanayay tu, ming-guo 59 a mihcaan (1970 a mihcaan) hawsa, cunus hantu Lian-Sin li , Suy-Nan-Tung a kenis mapulung tu Lian-Tung li atu Lian-Sin li . kalipunan i ming-ci 38 a mihcaan (1905 a mihcaan) tu sapatay a bulad, Cin-Kwa-Se a pi'kiman a buyu' mi'kimay a cu-zen ci An-Cin Liw-U-Lang hananay a tadamaw sa maazih niza ya nalaculan aalan (Á§¶, baluhay a kamu: si'elac) a liu-shen-tung , waluay a bulad malingatu patadas tu "pungpungkangan a zazan" maazih yadah ya si'kimay a nalaculan aalan (Á§¶, baluhay a kamu: si'elac) nu liu-shen-tung , sitatudungay tya nalaculan ci Tin-Cung Cang-Pin-Uy atu mikuwanay tu nalaculan ci Ciao-Song Zen-San-Lang , ya pi'kiman pangangan hantu "Cang-Zen" . hawsa saahebal satu tu pi'kiman u sakatusa "Cang-Zen", sakatulu "Cang-Zen", "sung" , cu , mey kahatiza tu. uyzaan a mihcaan Suy-Nan-Tung patizeng tu miacakay tuni sangaan a kusi , sinmung misulibetay tu si'kimay a nalaculan aaalan nu liu-shen-tung . katukuh i pikuwan nu Lipun i ming-ci 40 a mihcaan (1907 a mihcaan), Cin-Kwa-Se a pi'kiman saayaway izaw patahkal tu tung a nalaculan sa 47 kung-tun kayadah haymaw satu mala u singanganay tu si-tung a buyu' i tini i kitakit. Suy-Nan-Tung a niyazu' sikalecad tu a palekal tu 'kim atu tung a nalaculan , 1906 amihcaan i kalipunan i ming-ci 39 a mihcaan namisanga' tya pa'kiman hawsa haymaw satu macakat. ya pi'kiman a aenengan nu musakawaway, i Ciw-Ben a sauwac nu ayawan niya a pilis, kakilukilul satu misanga' tu luma' kakitizaan mueneng nu musakawaway nu Lipun. ya luma' izaw ku tusa a lamangan: pala sepatay han a laluma'an cacay a silut atu enemay a laluma'an cacay a silut. sepatay a laluma'an cacay a silut u mikuwanay a tademaw, patungusen tu aisian atu pililucan. enem a laluma'an cacay a silut u misakakawaway atu musakawaway ku muenengay, izaw tu ku aisian, nika kapulung han ku pililucan. musakawaway nu layak sateked sa i capi nu si-tungan , si-huangan a kakitizaan a lala' misadabek itiza. Ben-Shan Liu-Keng atu yung-ciw mey kuwang malingatu tu miala, tu i sasaay i bayubayuanay a Li-Le pisangaan tu tung patizeng tu kusi hawsa, satu u Suy-Nan-Tung ami'kimay niyazu' sangaleb satu kalipahak kuni kazuzip. nika kilul satu kuni kalawpes nu mi'kimay a kawaw sa, "Taywan m'ikimay a kusi" madeb tu kuya mi'kimay, ya muenengay a binawlan kakilul satu mabulaw, ya cayay kalimad a tademaw uyza tu balakiay tu a babalaki, "Taywan m'ikimay a kusi" ya matenesay musakawaway itiza a tademaw ku katuuday munengay i tiza. 2009 a mihcaan tuluay a bulad i tiniay tu patizeng tu nalimaan a luma' "San-Cen bangcalay' a luma'" amatuek a palahkal paazih, tu i'su-ciya atu labang amacacaliw tunian hanay. Suy-Nan-Tung nazipa'an a pi'kiman Suy-Nan-Tung nauyanayay tu misa'kimay a kusi, nauyanay tu singangan tu "sabaw tulu a dang a pi'kiman (katengaay sa u saba walu a dang). Suy-Nan-Tung a pisa'kiman malingatu i 1933 a mihcaan, amisabalucu' tu liwasak mikutkut miala atu zazan nu pi'kiman tu mahiniay a kawaw, Suy-Nan-Tung misangaay tu 'kim pakay buyu' a patizeng, u Suy-Nan-Tung nazipa'an a pi'kiman ku sakapahay pawacay tu laylay nu Cin-Kwa-Se mikitungay. Lipun a tademaw laluk sa mitadas tu 'kim i Cin-Kwa-Se hawsa, 1920 a mihcaan hakya maazih ya nalaculan aalan nu liu-shen-tung , maniyul mala tung nu mialaan atu misangaan. 1945 a mihcaan "Taywan 'kim tung a mi'kimay" ku mikuwanay, katukuh i 1955 a mihcaan pasumad a misapupu mala u "Taywan u mi'kimay nalaculan han tu a kusi" , 1978 a mihcaan hawsa kakilul satu i su'-mey a kenis, sakatulu Cang-Zen a pialaan kitizaan micapi tu satabakiay nuhekalay tu a pialaan, katukuh i 1987 a mihcaan pahezek musakakawaw. 2007 a mihcaan mala u Sinpak a kenis cenbu hantu pacumud hantu nipatizeng tu laylay. u pisanga' tu 'kim taneng malasepat tu kawaw uyni ayaw: "mitadas tu nalaculan, mipili' tu 'kim, misakapah tu 'kim, misa'kim tu". "sabaw tulu a dang a pi'kiman" naunayaannay tu hawsa naayaway uynian a Cin-Kwa-Se u satabakiay a kitizaan mipiliay tu nalaculan, nu ayzaay tu a mihcaan u kataynian nu MV misasing. namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan:
S.PHON: == tataŇčańßan == tajwan ¶iw-b…ôn suj-nan-tuŇč nazipa Ē~ °an nu pi Ē~ °kiman "sabaw tur~…ĺu a daŇč" ńßananaj . kakir~…ĺiman zikuzan pikuwan nu ńßur~…ĺam i nikakutajkutaj nu ¶iŇč katukuńß ajaw pikuwanan nu r~…ĺipun ujnian a k…ônis paŇčaŇčan ńßan suj-nan-tuŇč ńßan a nijazu Ē~ ° , ja "tabakiaj nisur~…ĺitan tu suj-nan-tuŇč" ńßananaj sa nu zikuzan tu pikuwan nu r~…ĺipun, pańß…ôz…ôk tu sakatusa a kitakitaj na maŇčaŇčajaw ńßawsa par~…ĺatusa ńßan tu r~…ĺian-tuŇč r~…ĺi atu ¶aŇč-z…ôn r~…ĺi ńßan. u kakitizaan suj-nan-tuŇč a i ¶iw-b…ôn sauwa ¶ tusa a tukus tu sa ¶umud a baju, i kar~…ĺipunan pisaŇčaŇčan tu "sabaw tur~…ĺu a daŇč a pi Ē~ °kiman" ńßawsa, kakir~…ĺur~…ĺ satu mabur~…ĺaw tajni, i r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu ajzaaj a r~…ĺian-sin r~…ĺi atu r~…ĺian-tuŇč r~…ĺi . suj-nan-tuŇč a kitizaan a ŇčaŇčan namakaj i pi Ē~ °kiŇčan a putańß tapiiŇčan nija tabakian a ba Ē~ °tu tu mar~…ĺu ¶aj nu baju a buńßaŇč, i tapiiŇčan nija buńßaŇč izaw ku sauwa ¶ musisir~…ĺ namakajza i buju Ē~ ° mu ¶ur~…ĺar~…ĺ, mar~…ĺu nu ajawaj i tapiiŇčan nu buńßaŇč masau sir~…ĺanu Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° "nan- ¶…ô-ti" paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu suj-nan-tuŇč. suj-nan-tuŇč mi ¶api tu baju, i sawar~…ĺi saamis a kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° mańßiniaj u masatakuaj, pajmińß ¶aan namakaj war~…ĺi saamisaj a bar~…ĺi pab…ôsut Ē~ ° sa mi ¶umud, tabaki ku bar~…ĺi udad. sapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaj suj-nan-tuŇč i kańßur~…ĺaman suj-nan-tuŇč a nijazu Ē~ ° ńßan, i kar~…ĺipunan u r~…ĺuj-baŇč ńßan a nijazu Ē~ °, pańß…ôz…ôk ku mamaŇčajaw nu kitakit sa mar~…ĺa u r~…ĺuj-baŇč a ¶…ôŇč , ja r~…ĺian-tuŇč r~…ĺi u janajaj tu, miŇč-guo ** a mińß ¶aan (**** a mińß ¶aan) ńßawsa, ¶unus ńßantu r~…ĺian-sin r~…ĺi , suj-nan-tuŇč a k…ônis mapur~…ĺuŇč tu r~…ĺian-tuŇč r~…ĺi atu r~…ĺian-sin r~…ĺi . kar~…ĺipunan i miŇč- ¶i ** a mińß ¶aan (**** a mińß ¶aan) tu sapataj a bur~…ĺad, ¶in-kwa-s…ô a pi Ē~ °kiman a buju Ē~ ° mi Ē~ °kimaj a ¶u-z…ôn ¶i an- ¶in r~…ĺiw-u-r~…ĺaŇč ńßananaj a tadamaw sa maazińß niza ja nar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan aar~…ĺan (*, bar~…ĺuńßaj a kamu: si Ē~ °…ôr~…ĺa ¶) a r~…ĺiu-sńß…ôn-tuŇč , war~…ĺuaj a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺiŇčatu patadas tu "puŇčpuŇčkaŇčan a zazan" maazińß jadańß ja si Ē~ °kimaj a nar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan aar~…ĺan (*, bar~…ĺuńßaj a kamu: si Ē~ °…ôr~…ĺa ¶) nu r~…ĺiu-sńß…ôn-tuŇč , sitatuduŇčaj tja nar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ¶i tin- ¶uŇč ¶aŇč-pin-uj atu mikuwanaj tu nar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ¶i ¶iao-soŇč z…ôn-san-r~…ĺaŇč , ja pi Ē~ °kiman paŇčaŇčan ńßantu " ¶aŇč-z…ôn" . ńßawsa saańß…ôbar~…ĺ satu tu pi Ē~ °kiman u sakatusa " ¶aŇč-z…ôn", sakatur~…ĺu " ¶aŇč-z…ôn", "suŇč" , ¶u , m…ô kańßatiza tu. ujzaan a mińß ¶aan suj-nan-tuŇč patiz…ôŇč tu mia ¶akaj tuni saŇčaan a kusi , sinmuŇč misur~…ĺib…ôtaj tu si Ē~ °kimaj a nar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan aaar~…ĺan nu r~…ĺiu-sńß…ôn-tuŇč . katukuńß i pikuwan nu r~…ĺipun i miŇč- ¶i ** a mińß ¶aan (**** a mińß ¶aan), ¶in-kwa-s…ô a pi Ē~ °kiman saajawaj izaw patańßkar~…ĺ tu tuŇč a nar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan sa ** kuŇč-tun kajadańß ńßajmaw satu mar~…ĺa u siŇčaŇčanaj tu si-tuŇč a buju Ē~ ° i tini i kitakit. suj-nan-tuŇč a nijazu Ē~ ° sikar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu a par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu Ē~ °kim atu tuŇč a nar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan , **** amińß ¶aan i kar~…ĺipunan i miŇč- ¶i ** a mińß ¶aan namisaŇča Ē~ ° tja pa Ē~ °kiman ńßawsa ńßajmaw satu ma ¶akat. ja pi Ē~ °kiman a a…ôn…ôŇčan nu musakawawaj, i ¶iw-b…ôn a sauwa ¶ nu ajawan nija a pir~…ĺis, kakir~…ĺukir~…ĺur~…ĺ satu misaŇča Ē~ ° tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° kakitizaan mu…ôn…ôŇč nu musakawawaj nu r~…ĺipun. ja r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° izaw ku tusa a r~…ĺamaŇčan: par~…ĺa s…ôpataj ńßan a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an ¶a ¶aj a sir~…ĺut atu …ôn…ômaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an ¶a ¶aj a sir~…ĺut. s…ôpataj a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an ¶a ¶aj a sir~…ĺut u mikuwanaj a tad…ômaw, patuŇčus…ôn tu aisian atu pir~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶an. …ôn…ôm a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an ¶a ¶aj a sir~…ĺut u misakakawawaj atu musakawawaj ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj, izaw tu ku aisian, nika kapur~…ĺuŇč ńßan ku pir~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶an. musakawawaj nu r~…ĺajak sat…ôk…ôd sa i ¶api nu si-tuŇčan , si-ńßuaŇčan a kakitizaan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° misadab…ôk itiza. b…ôn-sńßan r~…ĺiu-k…ôŇč atu juŇč- ¶iw m…ô kuwaŇč mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu miar~…ĺa, tu i sasaaj i bajubajuanaj a r~…ĺi-r~…ĺ…ô pisaŇčaan tu tuŇč patiz…ôŇč tu kusi ńßawsa, satu u suj-nan-tuŇč ami Ē~ °kimaj nijazu Ē~ ° saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb satu kar~…ĺipańßak kuni kazuzip. nika kir~…ĺur~…ĺ satu kuni kar~…ĺawp…ôs nu mi Ē~ °kimaj a kawaw sa, "tajwan m Ē~ °ikimaj a kusi" mad…ôb tu kuja mi Ē~ °kimaj, ja mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a binawr~…ĺan kakir~…ĺur~…ĺ satu mabur~…ĺaw, ja ¶ajaj kar~…ĺimad a tad…ômaw ujza tu bar~…ĺakiaj tu a babar~…ĺaki, "tajwan m Ē~ °ikimaj a kusi" ja mat…ôn…ôsaj musakawawaj itiza a tad…ômaw ku katuudaj mun…ôŇčaj i tiza. **** a mińß ¶aan tur~…ĺuaj a bur~…ĺad i tiniaj tu patiz…ôŇč tu nar~…ĺimaan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° "san- ¶…ôn baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj Ē~ ° a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °" amatu…ôk a par~…ĺańßkar~…ĺ paazińß, tu i Ē~ °su- ¶ija atu r~…ĺabaŇč ama ¶a ¶ar~…ĺiw tunian ńßanaj. suj-nan-tuŇč nazipa Ē~ °an a pi Ē~ °kiman suj-nan-tuŇč naujanajaj tu misa Ē~ °kimaj a kusi, naujanaj tu siŇčaŇčan tu "sabaw tur~…ĺu a daŇč a pi Ē~ °kiman (kat…ôŇčaaj sa u saba war~…ĺu a daŇč). suj-nan-tuŇč a pisa Ē~ °kiman mar~…ĺiŇčatu i **** a mińß ¶aan, amisabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° tu r~…ĺiwasak mikutkut miar~…ĺa atu zazan nu pi Ē~ °kiman tu mańßiniaj a kawaw, suj-nan-tuŇč misaŇčaaj tu Ē~ °kim pakaj buju Ē~ ° a patiz…ôŇč, u suj-nan-tuŇč nazipa Ē~ °an a pi Ē~ °kiman ku sakapańßaj pawa ¶aj tu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu ¶in-kwa-s…ô mikituŇčaj. r~…ĺipun a tad…ômaw r~…ĺar~…ĺuk sa mitadas tu Ē~ °kim i ¶in-kwa-s…ô ńßawsa, **** a mińß ¶aan ńßakja maazińß ja nar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan aar~…ĺan nu r~…ĺiu-sńß…ôn-tuŇč , manijur~…ĺ mar~…ĺa tuŇč nu miar~…ĺaan atu misaŇčaan. **** a mińß ¶aan "tajwan Ē~ °kim tuŇč a mi Ē~ °kimaj" ku mikuwanaj, katukuńß i **** a mińß ¶aan pasumad a misapupu mar~…ĺa u "tajwan u mi Ē~ °kimaj nar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ńßan tu a kusi" , **** a mińß ¶aan ńßawsa kakir~…ĺur~…ĺ satu i su Ē~ °-m…ô a k…ônis, sakatur~…ĺu ¶aŇč-z…ôn a piar~…ĺaan kitizaan mi ¶api tu satabakiaj nuńß…ôkar~…ĺaj tu a piar~…ĺaan, katukuńß i **** a mińß ¶aan pańß…ôz…ôk musakakawaw. **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa u sinpak a k…ônis ¶…ônbu ńßantu pa ¶umud ńßantu nipatiz…ôŇč tu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj. u pisaŇča Ē~ ° tu Ē~ °kim tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺas…ôpat tu kawaw ujni ajaw: "mitadas tu nar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan, mipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu Ē~ °kim, misakapańß tu Ē~ °kim, misa Ē~ °kim tu". "sabaw tur~…ĺu a daŇč a pi Ē~ °kiman" naunajaannaj tu ńßawsa naajawaj ujnian a ¶in-kwa-s…ô u satabakiaj a kitizaan mipir~…ĺiaj tu nar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan, nu ajzaaj tu a mińß ¶aan u katajnian nu m* misasiŇč. namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan:
S.FORM: == tatangahan == Taywan Ciw-Ben Suy-Nan-Tung nazipa'an nu pi'kiman "sabaw tulu a dang" hananay . kakiliman zikuzan pikuwan nu hulam i nikakutaykutay nu Cing katukuh ayaw pikuwanan nu Lipun uynian a kenis pangangan han Suy-Nan-Tung han a niyazu' , ya "tabakiay nisulitan tu Suy-Nan-Tung" hananay sa nu zikuzan tu pikuwan nu Lipun, pahezek tu sakatusa a kitakitay na mangangayaw hawsa palatusa han tu Lian-Tung li atu Cang-Zen li han. u kakitizaan Suy-Nan-Tung a i Ciw-Ben sauwac tusa a tukus tu sa cumud a bayu, i kalipunan pisangangan tu "sabaw tulu a dang a pi'kiman" hawsa, kakilul satu mabulaw tayni, i liwliw nu ayzaay a Lian-Sin li atu Lian-Tung li . Suy-Nan-Tung a kitizaan a ngangan namakay i pi'kingan a putah tapiingan niya tabakian a ba'tu tu malucay nu bayu a buhang, i tapiingan niya buhang izaw ku sauwac musisil namakayza i buyu' muculal, malu nu ayaway i tapiingan nu buhang masau silanu'ay a lala' "nan-ce-ti" pangangan han tu Suy-Nan-Tung. Suy-Nan-Tung micapi tu bayu, i sawali saamis a kalimucu' mahiniay u masatakuay, paymihcaan namakay wali saamisay a bali pabesut' sa micumud, tabaki ku bali udad. Sapalekal tu lalay Suy-Nan-Tung i kahulaman Suy-Nan-Tung a niyazu' han, i kalipunan u Luy-Bang han a niyazu', pahezek ku mamangayaw nu kitakit sa mala u Luy-Bang a ceng , ya Lian-Tung li u yanayay tu, ming-guo 59 a mihcaan (1970 a mihcaan) hawsa, cunus hantu Lian-Sin li , Suy-Nan-Tung a kenis mapulung tu Lian-Tung li atu Lian-Sin li . kalipunan i ming-ci 38 a mihcaan (1905 a mihcaan) tu sapatay a bulad, Cin-Kwa-Se a pi'kiman a buyu' mi'kimay a cu-zen ci An-Cin Liw-U-Lang hananay a tadamaw sa maazih niza ya nalaculan aalan (Á§¶, baluhay a kamu: si'elac) a liu-shen-tung , waluay a bulad malingatu patadas tu "pungpungkangan a zazan" maazih yadah ya si'kimay a nalaculan aalan (Á§¶, baluhay a kamu: si'elac) nu liu-shen-tung , sitatudungay tya nalaculan ci Tin-Cung Cang-Pin-Uy atu mikuwanay tu nalaculan ci Ciao-Song Zen-San-Lang , ya pi'kiman pangangan hantu "Cang-Zen" . hawsa saahebal satu tu pi'kiman u sakatusa "Cang-Zen", sakatulu "Cang-Zen", "sung" , cu , mey kahatiza tu. uyzaan a mihcaan Suy-Nan-Tung patizeng tu miacakay tuni sangaan a kusi , sinmung misulibetay tu si'kimay a nalaculan aaalan nu liu-shen-tung . katukuh i pikuwan nu Lipun i ming-ci 40 a mihcaan (1907 a mihcaan), Cin-Kwa-Se a pi'kiman saayaway izaw patahkal tu tung a nalaculan sa 47 kung-tun kayadah haymaw satu mala u singanganay tu si-tung a buyu' i tini i kitakit. Suy-Nan-Tung a niyazu' sikalecad tu a palekal tu 'kim atu tung a nalaculan , 1906 amihcaan i kalipunan i ming-ci 39 a mihcaan namisanga' tya pa'kiman hawsa haymaw satu macakat. ya pi'kiman a aenengan nu musakawaway, i Ciw-Ben a sauwac nu ayawan niya a pilis, kakilukilul satu misanga' tu luma' kakitizaan mueneng nu musakawaway nu Lipun. ya luma' izaw ku tusa a lamangan: pala sepatay han a laluma'an cacay a silut atu enemay a laluma'an cacay a silut. sepatay a laluma'an cacay a silut u mikuwanay a tademaw, patungusen tu aisian atu pililucan. enem a laluma'an cacay a silut u misakakawaway atu musakawaway ku muenengay, izaw tu ku aisian, nika kapulung han ku pililucan. musakawaway nu layak sateked sa i capi nu si-tungan , si-huangan a kakitizaan a lala' misadabek itiza. Ben-Shan Liu-Keng atu yung-ciw mey kuwang malingatu tu miala, tu i sasaay i bayubayuanay a Li-Le pisangaan tu tung patizeng tu kusi hawsa, satu u Suy-Nan-Tung ami'kimay niyazu' sangaleb satu kalipahak kuni kazuzip. nika kilul satu kuni kalawpes nu mi'kimay a kawaw sa, "Taywan m'ikimay a kusi" madeb tu kuya mi'kimay, ya muenengay a binawlan kakilul satu mabulaw, ya cayay kalimad a tademaw uyza tu balakiay tu a babalaki, "Taywan m'ikimay a kusi" ya matenesay musakawaway itiza a tademaw ku katuuday munengay i tiza. 2009 a mihcaan tuluay a bulad i tiniay tu patizeng tu nalimaan a luma' "San-Cen bangcalay' a luma'" amatuek a palahkal paazih, tu i'su-ciya atu labang amacacaliw tunian hanay. Suy-Nan-Tung nazipa'an a pi'kiman Suy-Nan-Tung nauyanayay tu misa'kimay a kusi, nauyanay tu singangan tu "sabaw tulu a dang a pi'kiman (katengaay sa u saba walu a dang). Suy-Nan-Tung a pisa'kiman malingatu i 1933 a mihcaan, amisabalucu' tu liwasak mikutkut miala atu zazan nu pi'kiman tu mahiniay a kawaw, Suy-Nan-Tung misangaay tu 'kim pakay buyu' a patizeng, u Suy-Nan-Tung nazipa'an a pi'kiman ku sakapahay pawacay tu laylay nu Cin-Kwa-Se mikitungay. Lipun a tademaw laluk sa mitadas tu 'kim i Cin-Kwa-Se hawsa, 1920 a mihcaan hakya maazih ya nalaculan aalan nu liu-shen-tung , maniyul mala tung nu mialaan atu misangaan. 1945 a mihcaan "Taywan 'kim tung a mi'kimay" ku mikuwanay, katukuh i 1955 a mihcaan pasumad a misapupu mala u "Taywan u mi'kimay nalaculan han tu a kusi" , 1978 a mihcaan hawsa kakilul satu i su'-mey a kenis, sakatulu Cang-Zen a pialaan kitizaan micapi tu satabakiay nuhekalay tu a pialaan, katukuh i 1987 a mihcaan pahezek musakakawaw. 2007 a mihcaan mala u Sinpak a kenis cenbu hantu pacumud hantu nipatizeng tu laylay. u pisanga' tu 'kim taneng malasepat tu kawaw uyni ayaw: "mitadas tu nalaculan, mipili' tu 'kim, misakapah tu 'kim, misa'kim tu". "sabaw tulu a dang a pi'kiman" naunayaannay tu hawsa naayaway uynian a Cin-Kwa-Se u satabakiay a kitizaan mipiliay tu nalaculan, nu ayzaay tu a mihcaan u kataynian nu MV misasing. namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan:
S.PHON: == tataŇčańßan == tajwan ¶iw-b…ôn suj-nan-tuŇč nazipa Ē~ °an nu pi Ē~ °kiman "sabaw tur~…ĺu a daŇč" ńßananaj . kakir~…ĺiman zikuzan pikuwan nu ńßur~…ĺam i nikakutajkutaj nu ¶iŇč katukuńß ajaw pikuwanan nu r~…ĺipun ujnian a k…ônis paŇčaŇčan ńßan suj-nan-tuŇč ńßan a nijazu Ē~ ° , ja "tabakiaj nisur~…ĺitan tu suj-nan-tuŇč" ńßananaj sa nu zikuzan tu pikuwan nu r~…ĺipun, pańß…ôz…ôk tu sakatusa a kitakitaj na maŇčaŇčajaw ńßawsa par~…ĺatusa ńßan tu r~…ĺian-tuŇč r~…ĺi atu ¶aŇč-z…ôn r~…ĺi ńßan. u kakitizaan suj-nan-tuŇč a i ¶iw-b…ôn sauwa ¶ tusa a tukus tu sa ¶umud a baju, i kar~…ĺipunan pisaŇčaŇčan tu "sabaw tur~…ĺu a daŇč a pi Ē~ °kiman" ńßawsa, kakir~…ĺur~…ĺ satu mabur~…ĺaw tajni, i r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu ajzaaj a r~…ĺian-sin r~…ĺi atu r~…ĺian-tuŇč r~…ĺi . suj-nan-tuŇč a kitizaan a ŇčaŇčan namakaj i pi Ē~ °kiŇčan a putańß tapiiŇčan nija tabakian a ba Ē~ °tu tu mar~…ĺu ¶aj nu baju a buńßaŇč, i tapiiŇčan nija buńßaŇč izaw ku sauwa ¶ musisir~…ĺ namakajza i buju Ē~ ° mu ¶ur~…ĺar~…ĺ, mar~…ĺu nu ajawaj i tapiiŇčan nu buńßaŇč masau sir~…ĺanu Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° "nan- ¶…ô-ti" paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu suj-nan-tuŇč. suj-nan-tuŇč mi ¶api tu baju, i sawar~…ĺi saamis a kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° mańßiniaj u masatakuaj, pajmińß ¶aan namakaj war~…ĺi saamisaj a bar~…ĺi pab…ôsut Ē~ ° sa mi ¶umud, tabaki ku bar~…ĺi udad. sapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaj suj-nan-tuŇč i kańßur~…ĺaman suj-nan-tuŇč a nijazu Ē~ ° ńßan, i kar~…ĺipunan u r~…ĺuj-baŇč ńßan a nijazu Ē~ °, pańß…ôz…ôk ku mamaŇčajaw nu kitakit sa mar~…ĺa u r~…ĺuj-baŇč a ¶…ôŇč , ja r~…ĺian-tuŇč r~…ĺi u janajaj tu, miŇč-guo ** a mińß ¶aan (**** a mińß ¶aan) ńßawsa, ¶unus ńßantu r~…ĺian-sin r~…ĺi , suj-nan-tuŇč a k…ônis mapur~…ĺuŇč tu r~…ĺian-tuŇč r~…ĺi atu r~…ĺian-sin r~…ĺi . kar~…ĺipunan i miŇč- ¶i ** a mińß ¶aan (**** a mińß ¶aan) tu sapataj a bur~…ĺad, ¶in-kwa-s…ô a pi Ē~ °kiman a buju Ē~ ° mi Ē~ °kimaj a ¶u-z…ôn ¶i an- ¶in r~…ĺiw-u-r~…ĺaŇč ńßananaj a tadamaw sa maazińß niza ja nar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan aar~…ĺan (*, bar~…ĺuńßaj a kamu: si Ē~ °…ôr~…ĺa ¶) a r~…ĺiu-sńß…ôn-tuŇč , war~…ĺuaj a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺiŇčatu patadas tu "puŇčpuŇčkaŇčan a zazan" maazińß jadańß ja si Ē~ °kimaj a nar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan aar~…ĺan (*, bar~…ĺuńßaj a kamu: si Ē~ °…ôr~…ĺa ¶) nu r~…ĺiu-sńß…ôn-tuŇč , sitatuduŇčaj tja nar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ¶i tin- ¶uŇč ¶aŇč-pin-uj atu mikuwanaj tu nar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ¶i ¶iao-soŇč z…ôn-san-r~…ĺaŇč , ja pi Ē~ °kiman paŇčaŇčan ńßantu " ¶aŇč-z…ôn" . ńßawsa saańß…ôbar~…ĺ satu tu pi Ē~ °kiman u sakatusa " ¶aŇč-z…ôn", sakatur~…ĺu " ¶aŇč-z…ôn", "suŇč" , ¶u , m…ô kańßatiza tu. ujzaan a mińß ¶aan suj-nan-tuŇč patiz…ôŇč tu mia ¶akaj tuni saŇčaan a kusi , sinmuŇč misur~…ĺib…ôtaj tu si Ē~ °kimaj a nar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan aaar~…ĺan nu r~…ĺiu-sńß…ôn-tuŇč . katukuńß i pikuwan nu r~…ĺipun i miŇč- ¶i ** a mińß ¶aan (**** a mińß ¶aan), ¶in-kwa-s…ô a pi Ē~ °kiman saajawaj izaw patańßkar~…ĺ tu tuŇč a nar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan sa ** kuŇč-tun kajadańß ńßajmaw satu mar~…ĺa u siŇčaŇčanaj tu si-tuŇč a buju Ē~ ° i tini i kitakit. suj-nan-tuŇč a nijazu Ē~ ° sikar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu a par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu Ē~ °kim atu tuŇč a nar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan , **** amińß ¶aan i kar~…ĺipunan i miŇč- ¶i ** a mińß ¶aan namisaŇča Ē~ ° tja pa Ē~ °kiman ńßawsa ńßajmaw satu ma ¶akat. ja pi Ē~ °kiman a a…ôn…ôŇčan nu musakawawaj, i ¶iw-b…ôn a sauwa ¶ nu ajawan nija a pir~…ĺis, kakir~…ĺukir~…ĺur~…ĺ satu misaŇča Ē~ ° tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° kakitizaan mu…ôn…ôŇč nu musakawawaj nu r~…ĺipun. ja r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° izaw ku tusa a r~…ĺamaŇčan: par~…ĺa s…ôpataj ńßan a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an ¶a ¶aj a sir~…ĺut atu …ôn…ômaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an ¶a ¶aj a sir~…ĺut. s…ôpataj a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an ¶a ¶aj a sir~…ĺut u mikuwanaj a tad…ômaw, patuŇčus…ôn tu aisian atu pir~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶an. …ôn…ôm a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an ¶a ¶aj a sir~…ĺut u misakakawawaj atu musakawawaj ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj, izaw tu ku aisian, nika kapur~…ĺuŇč ńßan ku pir~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶an. musakawawaj nu r~…ĺajak sat…ôk…ôd sa i ¶api nu si-tuŇčan , si-ńßuaŇčan a kakitizaan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° misadab…ôk itiza. b…ôn-sńßan r~…ĺiu-k…ôŇč atu juŇč- ¶iw m…ô kuwaŇč mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu miar~…ĺa, tu i sasaaj i bajubajuanaj a r~…ĺi-r~…ĺ…ô pisaŇčaan tu tuŇč patiz…ôŇč tu kusi ńßawsa, satu u suj-nan-tuŇč ami Ē~ °kimaj nijazu Ē~ ° saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb satu kar~…ĺipańßak kuni kazuzip. nika kir~…ĺur~…ĺ satu kuni kar~…ĺawp…ôs nu mi Ē~ °kimaj a kawaw sa, "tajwan m Ē~ °ikimaj a kusi" mad…ôb tu kuja mi Ē~ °kimaj, ja mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a binawr~…ĺan kakir~…ĺur~…ĺ satu mabur~…ĺaw, ja ¶ajaj kar~…ĺimad a tad…ômaw ujza tu bar~…ĺakiaj tu a babar~…ĺaki, "tajwan m Ē~ °ikimaj a kusi" ja mat…ôn…ôsaj musakawawaj itiza a tad…ômaw ku katuudaj mun…ôŇčaj i tiza. **** a mińß ¶aan tur~…ĺuaj a bur~…ĺad i tiniaj tu patiz…ôŇč tu nar~…ĺimaan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° "san- ¶…ôn baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj Ē~ ° a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °" amatu…ôk a par~…ĺańßkar~…ĺ paazińß, tu i Ē~ °su- ¶ija atu r~…ĺabaŇč ama ¶a ¶ar~…ĺiw tunian ńßanaj. suj-nan-tuŇč nazipa Ē~ °an a pi Ē~ °kiman suj-nan-tuŇč naujanajaj tu misa Ē~ °kimaj a kusi, naujanaj tu siŇčaŇčan tu "sabaw tur~…ĺu a daŇč a pi Ē~ °kiman (kat…ôŇčaaj sa u saba war~…ĺu a daŇč). suj-nan-tuŇč a pisa Ē~ °kiman mar~…ĺiŇčatu i **** a mińß ¶aan, amisabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° tu r~…ĺiwasak mikutkut miar~…ĺa atu zazan nu pi Ē~ °kiman tu mańßiniaj a kawaw, suj-nan-tuŇč misaŇčaaj tu Ē~ °kim pakaj buju Ē~ ° a patiz…ôŇč, u suj-nan-tuŇč nazipa Ē~ °an a pi Ē~ °kiman ku sakapańßaj pawa ¶aj tu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu ¶in-kwa-s…ô mikituŇčaj. r~…ĺipun a tad…ômaw r~…ĺar~…ĺuk sa mitadas tu Ē~ °kim i ¶in-kwa-s…ô ńßawsa, **** a mińß ¶aan ńßakja maazińß ja nar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan aar~…ĺan nu r~…ĺiu-sńß…ôn-tuŇč , manijur~…ĺ mar~…ĺa tuŇč nu miar~…ĺaan atu misaŇčaan. **** a mińß ¶aan "tajwan Ē~ °kim tuŇč a mi Ē~ °kimaj" ku mikuwanaj, katukuńß i **** a mińß ¶aan pasumad a misapupu mar~…ĺa u "tajwan u mi Ē~ °kimaj nar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ńßan tu a kusi" , **** a mińß ¶aan ńßawsa kakir~…ĺur~…ĺ satu i su Ē~ °-m…ô a k…ônis, sakatur~…ĺu ¶aŇč-z…ôn a piar~…ĺaan kitizaan mi ¶api tu satabakiaj nuńß…ôkar~…ĺaj tu a piar~…ĺaan, katukuńß i **** a mińß ¶aan pańß…ôz…ôk musakakawaw. **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa u sinpak a k…ônis ¶…ônbu ńßantu pa ¶umud ńßantu nipatiz…ôŇč tu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj. u pisaŇča Ē~ ° tu Ē~ °kim tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺas…ôpat tu kawaw ujni ajaw: "mitadas tu nar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan, mipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu Ē~ °kim, misakapańß tu Ē~ °kim, misa Ē~ °kim tu". "sabaw tur~…ĺu a daŇč a pi Ē~ °kiman" naunajaannaj tu ńßawsa naajawaj ujnian a ¶in-kwa-s…ô u satabakiaj a kitizaan mipir~…ĺiaj tu nar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan, nu ajzaaj tu a mińß ¶aan u katajnian nu m* misasiŇč. namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan:
